summary: Poster-First Homepage Architecture Testing Complete - ALL TESTS PASSED. Dashboard: ZERO video elements, hero poster loads REAL image (naturalWidth=800), Ken Burns animation active, light sweep shimmer visible, no mute button, no hero-video element. Story cards: poster-only with badge-pulse animation, hover shows scale(1.05) + card-light-sweep + play overlay, click navigates to /app/story-video-studio. Public landing page: ZERO video elements, all images loaded. Backend: story-feed API returns thumbnail_url, 5 concurrent image requests completed in 0.33s.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js HeroSection (lines 105-234): ALL video elements removed, poster-only with Ken Burns CSS animation
Dashboard.js StoryCard (lines 269-354): ALL video preview removed, poster-only with CSS hover effects
Dashboard.js CSS (lines 732-776): kenBurns, heroSweep, cardSweep, badgePulse animations defined
No Volume2/VolumeX imports - video controls completely removed
mediaUrl() function routes R2 CDN URLs through backend proxy for CORS/Safari/mobile compatibility
seed_data_creation: None - used existing story: The Painter of Stars
context_for_next_testing_agent: Poster-first architecture fully verified. Key findings: 1) ZERO video elements on dashboard and landing page, 2) Hero poster loads REAL image with naturalWidth=800, 3) Ken Burns animation active on hero poster, 4) Light sweep shimmer overlay visible after poster loads, 5) No mute button or hero-video element, 6) Story cards use poster-only with badge-pulse animation, 7) Card hover shows scale(1.05) transform + card-light-sweep + play overlay, 8) Card click navigates to /app/story-video-studio, 9) Public landing page has ZERO video elements, 10) All images load successfully, 11) story-feed API returns thumbnail_url, 12) 5 concurrent image requests < 3s (0.33s actual).
